positive: A minimalist, stylized mountain range silhouette at sunset. The foreground features geometric abstract forest shapes and a winding path leading into the distance. The sky should display deep indigo fading to vibrant tangerine and rose gold, achieved through bold, flat color blocks and gradient transitions. The overall aesthetic should evoke a mid-century modern travel poster, utilizing highly graphic linework and strong, intentional negative space. Composition should be perfectly centered and balanced, making it ideal for all-over apparel printing. Clean, crisp vector lines, high contrast, stylized nature illustration.
negative: blurry, noise, watermark, text, logos, gradient artifacts, photographic, low detail, extra limbs, bad anatomy, messy, ugly
